title: All News
content: All News | Name View/download Stanford list of the world’s top 2% Scientists 2024 Link Stanford list of the world’s top 2% scientists 2023 Link Honorable Vice Chancellor of JUIT, Prof. (Dr.) Rajendra Kumar Sharma is featured as "10 Must Watch Education Leaders of the Year-2023", by Higher Education Digest Link Eight Jaypee University Students’ joined US Universities under Foreign Exchange Program - Himachal Tonite Link Mr. Mukund Mitra, a Prime Minister Research Fellow from Robert Bosch Center for Cyber Physical Systems, Indian Institute of Science, Bengaluru is teaching robotics related courses to the final year students in ECE Department. Link Dr. Aman, Assistant Professor, CSE Department and his team of third year students have proposed a framework for the prediction of Cardiovascular disease with an accuracy of 92.34% Link 04 Students (2021-22) of Biotechnology ( B.Tech and M.Sc) Joined Internship at South Dakota School of Mines & Technology, USA Link Stanford list of world’s top 2% scientists 2021 Link Dr. Ashutosh Sharma (Ph.D. Scholar- Dept of ECE) has joined Institute of Computer Technology and Information Security, Southern Federal University (SFedU), Rastov-on-Don, Russia as Postdoctoral Research Scientist. Link 29 Patents Granted to JUIT / Inventors Download 8 Students (2017-18) of BT&BI Joined Internship at South Dakota School of Mines & Technology, USA Download Hilly Ramblings Link B.Tech. Student of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics Dept. selected for direct Ph.D. in IISc Banglore Download Ankush Bansal (Ph.D. Scholar - Dept. of BT & BI) selected as Postdoctoral Researcher at World's top 5 Children National Hospital, Washington DC, USA.
